title: Pride Magazine Announces 34th Annual Pride Awards
summary: Pride Magazine's 34th Annual Pride Awards will be held on July 10 at the Ritz-Carlton in Charlotte, celebrating community achievements.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes contributions to the LGBTQ+ community and highlights positive local events.

title: Water Main Break Closes Providence Road in Charlotte
summary: A broken water main caused the closure of inbound lanes on Providence Road, disrupting traffic and water service.

title: Former Mayoral Candidate Offers to Serve as Interim Mayor

title: Mandatory Water Restrictions Begin in Charlotte Due to Drought
summary: Charlotte Water implements mandatory water restrictions on May 15 due to a severe drought, limiting water usage for residents.

title: Cornelius Officials Oppose I-77 Toll Project in Charlotte

title: CMPD Raids East Charlotte Arcade, Seizes Cash and Guns
summary: Police raided an east Charlotte gambling arcade, seizing nearly $38K in cash, numerous devices, and two guns.

title: Charlotte Woman Sentenced in Child Sexual Exploitation Case
summary: Aisha Khan received a 262-month prison sentence followed by lifetime supervised release for child sexual exploitation.

title: One Firefighter Killed, Multiple Injured in Searsmont Fire
summary: A fire and explosion in Searsmont resulted in the death of one firefighter and injuries to at least 10 others.
